import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
let n = list.len(lines)
mut i = 0
let limit = if n > 0
  match lines.get(n - 1)
  when Some(s)
    if string.is_empty(s)
      n - 1
    else
      n
    end
  when None
    n
  end
else
  0
end
while i < limit
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    println("[#{i}] #{line}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
